args.query: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='clinical_info' ORDER BY ordinal_position;

args.query: SELECT diagnosis, COUNT(*) AS n FROM clinical_info GROUP BY diagnosis ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 20;

args.code:
import json, re, pandas as pd

# Load clinical alive BRCA (approximated by breast cancer ICD-10 C50.9) from file
path = var_call_Nd1eXzTjqGnwZrAvhSQg46J8
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    clin = json.load(f)

df_clin = pd.DataFrame(clin)
# Extract TCGA barcode from Patient_description text
pat = re.compile(r'(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})')
df_clin['ParticipantBarcode'] = df_clin['participantbarcode'].apply(lambda x: pat.search(x).group(1) if isinstance(x,str) and pat.search(x) else None)
# Keep only alive by filtering presence of 'vital status' = Alive in description (more accurate than person_neoplasm_cancer_status)
df_clin_alive = df_clin[df_clin['participantbarcode'].str.contains('vital status is Alive|vital status: Alive|vital status = Alive|Vital status recorded as Alive|vital status Alive', case=False, na=False)].copy()
# Drop missing barcode
df_clin_alive = df_clin_alive[df_clin_alive['ParticipantBarcode'].notna()].copy()

# Load CDH1 mutation participant list
mut_path = var_call_4KghtbmeATWtXtOFj2fixcC3
with open(mut_path, 'r') as f:
    muts = json.load(f)
df_mut = pd.DataFrame(muts)
df_mut = df_mut.drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])
df_mut['CDH1_mut'] = 1

# Merge
merged = df_clin_alive[['ParticipantBarcode','histological_type']].drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])
merged = merged.merge(df_mut[['ParticipantBarcode','CDH1_mut']], on='ParticipantBarcode', how='left')
merged['CDH1_mut'] = merged['CDH1_mut'].fillna(0).astype(int)

# Compute percentages by histological_type
grp = merged.groupby('histological_type').agg(n_alive=('ParticipantBarcode','nunique'), n_mut=('CDH1_mut','sum')).reset_index()
grp['pct_mut'] = (grp['n_mut'] / grp['n_alive'] * 100).round(2)
# filter histological types with at least 5 alive patients to avoid tiny denominators
grp_f = grp[grp['n_alive']>=5].sort_values(['pct_mut','n_mut','n_alive'], ascending=False)

top3 = grp_f.head(3).to_dict(orient='records')
out = json.dumps(top3)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(out)

import json, re, pandas as pd

# Load clinical alive BRCA (approximated by breast cancer ICD-10 C50.9) from file
path = var_call_Nd1eXzTjqGnwZrAvhSQg46J8
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    clin = json.load(f)

df_clin = pd.DataFrame(clin)
# Extract TCGA barcode from Patient_description text
pat = re.compile(r'(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})')
df_clin['ParticipantBarcode'] = df_clin['participantbarcode'].apply(lambda x: pat.search(x).group(1) if isinstance(x,str) and pat.search(x) else None)
# Keep only alive by filtering presence of 'vital status' = Alive in description (more accurate than person_neoplasm_cancer_status)
df_clin_alive = df_clin[df_clin['participantbarcode'].str.contains('vital status is Alive|vital status: Alive|vital status = Alive|Vital status recorded as Alive|vital status Alive', case=False, na=False)].copy()
# Drop missing barcode
df_clin_alive = df_clin_alive[df_clin_alive['ParticipantBarcode'].notna()].copy()

# Load CDH1 mutation participant list
mut_path = var_call_4KghtbmeATWtXtOFj2fixcC3
with open(mut_path, 'r') as f:
    muts = json.load(f)
df_mut = pd.DataFrame(muts)
df_mut = df_mut.drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])
df_mut['CDH1_mut'] = 1

# Merge
merged = df_clin_alive[['ParticipantBarcode','histological_type']].drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])
merged = merged.merge(df_mut[['ParticipantBarcode','CDH1_mut']], on='ParticipantBarcode', how='left')
merged['CDH1_mut'] = merged['CDH1_mut'].fillna(0).astype(int)

# Compute percentages by histological_type
grp = merged.groupby('histological_type').agg(n_alive=('ParticipantBarcode','nunique'), n_mut=('CDH1_mut','sum')).reset_index()
grp['pct_mut'] = (grp['n_mut'] / grp['n_alive'] * 100).round(2)
# filter histological types with at least 5 alive patients to avoid tiny denominators
grp_f = grp[grp['n_alive']>=5].sort_values(['pct_mut','n_mut','n_alive'], ascending=False)

top3 = grp_f.head(3).to_dict(orient='records')
out = json.dumps(top3)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(out)
